params.name: Golden Mead
params.description: In a white skull goblet, the enticing golden-yellow liquor swirls, with each drop's aroma surpassing any aged vintage wine, yet each drop exudes an ominous aura, enough to intoxicate any creature to death... Warning: DrinkingThis wine will plunge you into a state of physical and mental stagnation, leaving you with only a scant few moments of madness for the rest of your life!
